name: Apples
meta: The 'Wash' is a lie. Pesticides are in the wax.
description: Apples are often coated in shellac or petroleum-based wax to preserve shelf life, trapping pesticides underneath.

tidbits.label: Storage Life
tidbits.text: Conventional apples can be stored in cold rooms for 9-12 months.

tidbits.label: Pesticide Load
tidbits.text: Ranked consistently in the top 5 of the Dirty Dozen.

name: Beef
description: Standard beef is 'Grain-Finished' in feedlots, which spikes inflammatory Omega-6 levels.

tidbits.label: CLA Content
tidbits.text: Grass-fed beef contains 3-5x more Conjugated Linoleic Acid (CLA).

tidbits.label: Omega Ratio
tidbits.text: Grass-fed has an Omega 3:6 ratio of ~1:3.

name: Eggs
description: Cage-free birds often never see the sun. Pasture-raised get 108sq ft each.

tidbits.label: Nutrient Density
tidbits.text: Pasture eggs have 2x more Omega-3s and 3x more Vitamin D.
